raw_consumer_statement: A subscription service I had with XXXX renewed on XX/XX/year>. They charged my American Express credit card on XX/XX/year> for this renewal subscription. I attempted to cancel the subscription with XXXX on the XXXX and XXXX based on the increased price of the service ( which they would not discount ). XXXX informed me that they would not cancel the subscription and the full amount charge would continue for the full year from the charge a few days earlier. I disputed this charge with American Express. They took weeks to investigate and ultimately have concluded that I must pay XXXX ( for a subscription that I attempted to return within a few days of the charge ).
